languages.text: "Адептус Астра Телепатика? Позвольте, из-за ранения ваш рассудок, верно, помутился. Тридцать лет как благородный род Гапрак тесно связан с благословенным Культом Механикус".

"The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."
languages.original_text: "Адептус Астра Телепатика? Позвольте, из-за ранения ваш рассудок, верно, помутился. Тридцать лет как благородный род Гапрак тесно связан с благословенным Культом Механикус".

traits.locale_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

"The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

"The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

languages.text: «¿El Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Disculpe mi franqueza, pero su herida ha debido de afectar a su mente. El linaje Gaprak tiene relaciones estrechas con el bendito Culto Mechanicus desde hace 30 años».
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: «¿El Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Disculpe mi franqueza, pero su herida ha debido de afectar a su mente. El linaje Gaprak tiene relaciones estrechas con el bendito Culto Mechanicus desde hace 30 años».

languages.text: “星语庭？恕我直言，你肯定是伤糊涂了。三十年来，高贵的贾帕克一直与受祝的机械修会保持着密切联系。”
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: “星语庭？恕我直言，你肯定是伤糊涂了。三十年来，高贵的贾帕克一直与受祝的机械修会保持着密切联系。”

languages.text: « L'Adeptus Astra Telepathica ? Sans vouloir vous offenser, votre blessure a dû vous embrouiller l'esprit. Depuis trente ans, la noble lignée des Gaprak est intiment liée au saint Culte Mechanicus. »
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: « L'Adeptus Astra Telepathica ? Sans vouloir vous offenser, votre blessure a dû vous embrouiller l'esprit. Depuis trente ans, la noble lignée des Gaprak est intiment liée au saint Culte Mechanicus. »

languages.text: "Adeptus Astra Telepathica mı? Doğrudan söylediğim için kusura bakma ama yaran, zihnini bulandırmış olmalı. Otuz yıldır Gaprak'ın soylu soyu, kutsal Cult Mechanicus ile yakından ilişkili."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: "Adeptus Astra Telepathica mı? Doğrudan söylediğim için kusura bakma ama yaran, zihnini bulandırmış olmalı. Otuz yıldır Gaprak'ın soylu soyu, kutsal Cult Mechanicus ile yakından ilişkili."

languages.text: "Das Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Verzeiht meine Direktheit, aber Eure Verletzung scheint Euren Verstand zu trüben. Dreißig Jahre lang war die edle Linie derer von Gaprak mit dem gesegneten Kult Mechanicus eng verbunden."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: "Das Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Verzeiht meine Direktheit, aber Eure Verletzung scheint Euren Verstand zu trüben. Dreißig Jahre lang war die edle Linie derer von Gaprak mit dem gesegneten Kult Mechanicus eng verbunden."

languages.text: 「アデプタ・アストラ・テレパシカですか？率直に言って申し訳ありませんが、あなたの怪我で頭が混乱しているのでしょう。30年間、高貴なガプラク家は、祝福された機械神教と密接に関係してきました。」
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Astra Telepathica? Excuse my directness, but your injury must have clouded your mind. For thirty years, the noble line of Gaprak has been closely associated with the blessed Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: 「アデプタ・アストラ・テレパシカですか？率直に言って申し訳ありませんが、あなたの怪我で頭が混乱しているのでしょう。30年間、高貴なガプラク家は、祝福された機械神教と密接に関係してきました。」
